_publications._publicationTitle: Modelling neurofibromatosis type 1 tibial dysplasia and its treatment with lovastatin.

_contextSnippet: Quantitative μCT analysis revealed a 75% reduction of BV/TV in the cortical regions (0.394 ± 0.19 versus 0.11 ± 0.07) as well as slight decrease in the average BV/TV in the bone marrow cavity
details: 75% reduction of BV/TV in cortical regions (0.394 ± 0.19 versus 0.11 ± 0.07) and slight decrease in bone marrow cavity (0.201 ± 0.26 versus 0.168 ± 0.16) at day 14 post injury
